task: Wire the FREE survivor signal into GENERATION steering, so the engine generates differently from the signal that has data today. Build-114 READ the survivor leaderboard (getSurvivorTemplateStats: templates whose machine-generated conjectures survived falsification to high bounds) but only NARRATED it; B116 makes it down-weight OVER-mined templates so the mined cohort favors UNDER-explored regions (GENTLE DIVERSIFY), unioned with B113's Lean down-weights.
base: origin/main @ 0dff782 (Merge survivor-learning B114 into outcome-aware generation B113)
approach: All steering logic stays inside lib/conjecture-gen.js as PURE functions, merged in the wrapper (NOT by changing buildGenFeedbackProfile's signature, so B113's 2-arg call-site binding stays green). (1) survivorOverMinedTemplates(leaderboard) -> the over-mined template KEYS to down-weight, filtered to real TEMPLATES (a legacy/unknown id cannot steer the schedule, so it is excluded -> telemetry == what ACTUALLY steered). The survivor leaderboard is already productivity-gated by getSurvivorTemplateStats (count >= M8_SURVIVOR_MIN_COUNT) and capped at 5, so every returned template is by-definition over-mined and a strict subset of the 10 -> steering always shifts composition. (2) mergeSurvivorDownWeight(leanProfile, survivorTemplates) UNIONS the survivor down-weights into B113's Lean profile, keeping provenance distinguishable via a new fromSurvivor[] field. (3) The wrapper builds leanProfile via buildGenFeedbackProfile(earnedPatterns, failedPatterns) [B113 unchanged] then mergeSurvivorDownWeight. Reuses buildTemplateSchedule's existing soft down-weight (occ>=1, never excluded) -> gentle. The KEY ALIGNMENT that makes this clean: survivor leaderboard .template == c.template == a TEMPLATES key (stamped at conjecture-gen.js m3_template), the SAME vocabulary the schedule iterates, so no translation.
gate_preserved: The matched baseline is STILL rebuilt from the (now also survivor-biased) mined composition (mined.map(c=>c.template)) -> like-with-like, Wilson/Newcombe gate stays unbiased. Micro-prover, vacuity floor, falsifier, and the machine-generated/never-proven contract are UNTOUCHED.
gen_version: 3 -> 4 (honest 'never compare silently' bump: output now also depends on the survivor snapshot). EMPTY union (no Lean outcome earned AND no survivor template earned) => mined cohort byte-identical to gen v2 for the seed; only the stamp + m3_feedback metadata differ.
kill_switches: M8_SURVIVOR_STEER_DISABLED=1 -> survivor steering off, B113 Lean steering intact. M8_GEN_STEER_DISABLED=1 -> MASTER off (both Lean + survivor empty -> v2 cohort). GRAPH_DISABLED / missing creds / any Supabase error -> fail-safe to the unsteered v2 cohort.
telemetry: loop.js metadata.learn gains survivor_steered (bool) + survivor_down_weighted (template list), sourced from m3.feedback.fromSurvivor -- DISTINCT from down_weighted (B113 Lean+survivor union), from fromVerified/fromFailed (B113 Lean-only provenance in the feedback object), and from survivor_template_tags (B114 what earned the evidence gate / narration). The survivor->Generate wire is auditable from Supabase alone.
tests: B116 45/45 (14/14 core + 31 wiring). ACCEPTANCE wire-detector passes: same seed, EMPTY survivor leaderboard vs MOCK over-mined template -> cohort composition DIFFERS (A_res_sigma_max: empty=12 vs survivor-steered=4 draws); EMPTY => byte-identical balanced round-robin; a no-op wire would make them identical and FAIL the check. Plus union, both kill switches, and fail-safe.
regressions: ALL GREEN -- B113 49/49, B114 (survivor-learning) 50/50, B112 (learn-loop) 44/44, m3-conjecture 53/53, B92 40/40, B99 37/37.
node_absent: Node is not installed on host (repo convention). Verification is the PS 5.1 mirror + source bindings. JS sanity: braces 351/351 + brackets 170/170 balanced; paren delta vs origin/main is +52/+52 (perfectly balanced; the pre-existing 800/798 crude imbalance is prose parens inside string literals, present before this build). No JS syntax checker available -> a Vercel build is the final proof, pending deploy OK.
deviation: Updated tests/B113-outcome-aware-gen-verify.ps1 lines 252 (the only hardcoded GEN_VERSION literal in the whole suite: =3 -> =4) and 301 (label 'now 3' -> 'now 4'). This is OUTSIDE the stated 4-file scope but is a necessary consequence of the mandated GEN_VERSION bump, and Muhammad explicitly approved it ('Update B113:252 (Recommended)') when I flagged the scope-vs-regression conflict BEFORE editing. B113's behavioral checks (down-weight mechanism) are all unchanged; only the stale version literal moved with the code.
scope_respected: Did NOT touch lib/orchestrator.js or lib/learn-status.js (a parallel session owns those). Did NOT edit lib/conjecture-memory.js (imported only). survivorTemplates is consumed read-only.
honesty: Load-bearing and preserved: survivors are tested-to-N EMPIRICAL evidence, NEVER proven/true. This STEERS generation from a weak empirical signal -- gentle, gated (only templates >= M8_SURVIVOR_MIN_COUNT, enforced by getSurvivorTemplateStats), and it NEVER touches survival, the gate, or truth. Packet frames it as 'EMPIRICAL evidence tested to N, NEVER proven; a gentle diversify away from over-mined structures'; a down-weighted region is 'comparatively over-explored', NEVER solved/proven/true.
live_data_effect: On today's live snapshot (earned_patterns:0 because the Lean checker is parked; survivor leaderboard earns ~5 templates), B116 makes the cohort diverge from gen v2 IMMEDIATELY: the wire now generates differently from the signal that has data today -- which B113 alone could not, being Lean-starved.
live_verify_pending: After deploy, confirm the next cron-explore m8_loop_runs row carries metadata.learn.survivor_steered=true + metadata.learn.survivor_down_weighted=[...templates], gen_version=4, and the chat packet's FEEDBACK STEERING line names the FREE survivor signal.
notes: Muhammad merges (do NOT deploy without explicit OK). Rollback after merge = env kills above, or revert this branch.
